iron_key.name: iron key
iron_key.description: A small iron key. The bow is cast in the shape of a hare.

copper_key.name: copper key
copper_key.description: A small copper key. Simpler in design than you'd expect.

oil_lamp.name: oil lamp
oil_lamp.description: A brass oil lamp. The reservoir is about half full.

writing_desk.name: writing desk
writing_desk.description: A large wooden desk. Its surface is bare except for a faint ring left by some long-gone cup.

chest.name: small chest
chest.description: A small wooden chest secured with an iron lock.
